bio: Backing the next generation of deep-tech and fintech founders 🚀 | Expanding our executive suites in Austin, TX | Build updates below
dm: Hey Aether Artisans team! We are currently completing the build-out of our brand-new partner offices and executive boardrooms downtown on Congress Ave. We want to completely outfit our 12 partner desks with matching, bespoke mechanical keyboards and precision-milled desk accessories that align with our dark walnut and brass interior design concept. Do you do custom B2B enterprise commissions, and can we set up a design consultation at your Austin studio this week to look at material finishes?

recentPosts.caption: Austin HQ expansion update! The custom walnut partner desks were just installed by the carpentry team. Every detail matters when creating an environment where high-stakes decisions happen. Next up: outfitting the executive workspaces. 🏢💼 #fintech #austintech #officeinteriors

recentPosts.caption: Welcoming our newest portfolio company to the Apex family. Deep-tech infrastructure is transforming the landscape, and we are proud to lead their $14M Series A block.

recentPosts.caption: Quiet mornings in the partner lounge before the pitch decks start rolling in. The natural morning light hitting these concrete pillars is incredible.

recentPosts.caption: Reflecting on our first investment cycle 5 years ago. Scale is built one deliberate brick at a time. Thank you to our exceptional network of LPs and founders.

bio: Staff Systems Engineer | Compilers, low-level optimization, and open-source systems | ⌨️ heavy typing era | Vancouver, BC
dm: Yo! Love the sound tests you guys post of your machined aluminum cases. I'm building a custom 75% board right now and I'm looking for a premium, heavy aluminum desk tray to match my space. Do you ship your retail accessories to Canada, or do you restrict orders to the US? Let me know so I can place an order tonight, thanks!

recentPosts.caption: Rebuilt my local compilation rig this weekend. Clean cable management, low-profile case layout, and zero RGB distractions. Switched back to tactile switches for a heavier typing feel during long code reviews. 💻⚙️ #softwareengineering #sysprog #wfhsetups
recentPosts.imageDescription: A clean, dark-themed developer workspace featuring an ultrawide monitor displaying complex terminal windows, a matte black keyboard, and an open computer case with pristine industrial piping.

recentPosts.caption: Late night debugging a memory leak in the new compiler engine. Casein shake, terminal open, lo-fi playing. This is where the real breakthroughs happen.
recentPosts.imageDescription: A low-light close-up shot of a monitor casting an amber glow onto a desk mat, with complex code lines highlighted in green and orange text.

recentPosts.caption: Finally moving my open-source virtualization project out of alpha. 14 months of grinding through raw documentation. Readme breakdown link in bio for the systems nerds.
recentPosts.imageDescription: A mechanical pencil resting on a grid-lined notebook covered in complex handwritten tree data structures and memory map sketches.

bio: 📈 We scale your product brand via cold outreach automation | B2B lead generation systems | DM 'SCALE' for 500 free leads!
dm: Hey aether.artisans founder! I was parsing your Instagram profile metrics and you guys are leaving massive money on the table by relying entirely on inbound traffic. We can scrape a custom list of 5,000 corporate tech founders in Texas and run fully automated cold-email sequences to book your calendar solid with multi-desk design commissions. Can we hop on a quick 15-min zoom call this Thursday at 2 PM to show you the data pipeline?

recentPosts.caption: Stop wasting hours manually prospecting for B2B clients. Our automated scraping infrastructure does the work for you while you sleep. Slide into our DMs to scale your revenue engine.
recentPosts.imageDescription: A stark white presentation slide graphic displaying bold dark navy typography reading 'Inbound marketing is dead. Scale outbound now.'

bio: Boutique Corporate Architecture & Office Staging | Creating workspace sanctuaries for tech companies | Dallas • Houston
dm: Hello! I am an office design consultant working on outfitting a new 5,000 sq ft tech agency space in Dallas. We want to feature highly premium, tactile desk elements for the central software engineering bullpen desks to match our industrial-minimalist design language. I love your studio's custom machined hardware curation. Do you work with external interior designers on corporate staging contracts, and can you handle wholesale production for 25+ matching keyboard units?

recentPosts.caption: Mood boarding for our upcoming tech agency staging project in Dallas. Blending matte concrete finishes, raw aluminum, and charcoal acoustic panels to create a hyper-focused workspace sanctuary. 🏢📐 #workspacearchitecture #officestaging #dallasdesign

bio: Helping local premium hardware brands dominate short-form video 🎬 | High-conversion workspace video production | Austin based
dm: Okay, I have to say, your industrial design language is completely flawless, the precision milling clips are mesmerizing! 😍 I'm a local short-form content producer based right here in Austin, and I specialize in shooting high-end ASMR keyboard typing tests and macro workspace aesthetic videos for premium tech and desk setup brands. Your inventory is perfectly positioned to capture massive traffic on tech-reels. I ran a comprehensive analysis on your top 3 competitors and put together a free 5-day video retention strategy layout for you. Mind if I drop the review link over?

recentPosts.caption: Behind the lens with a premium mechanical switch brand in East Austin today. The secret to a high-converting macro hook? Ultra-crisp audio tracking, high-contrast matte shadows, and showing text overlays within the first 1.2 seconds. 🎬⌨️ #ugccreator #workspaceaesthetic #videomarketing
recentPosts.imageDescription: A close-up camera monitor view tracking a macro lens focusing tightly on a series of custom aluminum mechanical keyboard keys being pressed down inside a dimly lit professional studio.

recentPosts.caption: A message to small design studios: stop just taking static photos of your manufacturing process. You need to show the raw mechanical sounds, the machining shavings, and the tactile movement.
recentPosts.imageDescription: A mobile screen interface screenshot showcasing a social media analytics line graph with a steep, sharp green vertical climb under a text overlay.
